critic_raw:
Issue CREDIT-1 — Selective labels from approved-only cohort; expansion to excluded populations requires generalization evidence.
Issue CREDIT-2 — Approval threshold not specified; ranking metrics insufficient for automated decisions.
Issue CREDIT-3 — Regulatory prerequisites (fair lending, adverse action, model governance) not addressed.
defender_raw:
Pass 1 (Critic output visible):
All three issues valid. CREDIT-1: empirically open; pilot needed. CREDIT-2: concede. CREDIT-3: concede. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

debate_rounds.critic_move: Accept pilot framing for CREDIT-1. The key test: does the model's calibration hold for previously-excluded segments when loans are actually extended to them? This can only be answered with realized outcome data from a pilot.
debate_rounds.defender_move: Agreed. Champion-challenger pilot with 12-month observation window on realized defaults. Also require disparate impact analysis as part of the pilot evaluation since regulatory scope (CREDIT-3) is conceded.
debate_rounds.resolution: RESOLVED: all issues — CREDIT-1 empirical test agreed; CREDIT-2 and CREDIT-3 conceded

adjudication_raw:
ADJUDICATION — scope_intent_credit_launch_303 — Multi-Round Run 2

Consistent with Run 1. All issues resolved.

Verdict: EMPIRICAL_TEST_AGREED

empirical_test.measure: champion-challenger pilot: 12-month default observation in newly-expanded segments; disparate impact analysis on pilot approvals
empirical_test.success_criterion: realized defaults consistent with predictions; no disparate impact
empirical_test.failure_criterion: defaults exceed predictions; disparate impact identified; or calibration degrades in new segments
